Blade Service
We've Got It
No scheduling needed during the Founding Team Pilot.
🏒
Blade pickup is handled at team skates.
Just bring your blades to your next team skate. EDGE will handle pickup, sharpening, and return — no drop-off scheduling required.

Steel Health Guide
Healthy (0–50%): Steel in great shape. EDGE monitors wear at each service. No action needed.
Mid Life (50–75%): Performing well. Good time to start planning for replacement steel.
Replace Soon (75%+): Steel approaching end of life. Order replacement runners before performance is affected.
